diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -37,4 +37,20 @@
         prob_true = torch.clamp(prob_true, min=self.eps, max=1.0)

         # Calculate GCE loss: (1 - p^q) / q

         gce_loss = (1 - torch.pow(prob_true, self.q)) / self.q

-        return gce_loss.mean()
+        return gce_loss.mean()

+

+class MeanAbsoluteError(nn.Module):

+    def __init__(self, num_classes=100):

+        super(MeanAbsoluteError, self).__init__()

+        self.num_classes = num_classes

+        self.eps = 1e-7

+

+    def forward(self, pred, targets):

+        # Apply softmax to get probabilities

+        prob = torch.softmax(pred, dim=1)

+        # Create one-hot encoding of targets

+        one_hot = torch.zeros_like(prob)

+        one_hot.scatter_(1, targets.unsqueeze(1), 1)

+        # Calculate MAE loss

+        mae_loss = 1.0 - torch.sum(one_hot * prob, dim=1)

+        return mae_loss.mean()
